content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.02%, VIX +9% to 18.35 — risk-off tone with Realty/Energy/Auto leading down. However, defensive pockets (Pharma, FMCG, Healthcare, IT mid-caps) showing strong relative strength with stock-specific catalysts driving outsized moves (TATACONSUM +9%, COFORGE +7.7%, LALPATHLAB +7.2%, MCX +5.2%). Book is heavily defensive-tilted which fits the tape; MCX shows an obvious data anomaly (CMP 3191 vs entry 8400 = -62%, but research confirms MCX trades ~3201 — the 8400 entry is clearly a corrupted cost basis, not a real -62% loss).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold hedge intact; -1.1% on mild gold profit-booking. SL 121 = -3.3% from CMP, room intact. Geopolitical/INR tailwinds still supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+3.3% gainer, fresh 52w high after Q4 beat. Current SL 832 already at breakeven+ (1.5% above entry, 1.7% below CMP 846.30) — satisfies Rule 18 trail-gap discipline (>1% below LTP). Target 870 intact (MOFSL TP 950). No-op; emitting HOLD effectively."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1357.30,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "+10.1% winner, SL already trailed to 1357.30 (entry+7.8%, ~2% below CMP 1384.40 — satisfies 1% trail-gap floor). Encora/Cigniti integration thesis intact, broker TPs 1690-2020. Hold target at 1450, keep SL locked-in gains. No further tighten — leave room for the run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, SL 2740 = -1.6% from CMP 2784, target 2920. Strong Q4 (PAT +47% FY26), Odisha capex expansion. Trail-up not yet triggered (P&L <2%). Hold as-is."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 8950.00,
      "new_target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Touched 52w high 9136 today on 3.3x volume but faded to 9062 (-0.4% from entry). Q4 margin compression flagged (PAT +6% vs revenue +27%) and UltraTech competitive threat — keep SL tight at 8950 (-1.2% from CMP). No-op effectively, retaining stored levels."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, SL 10440 = -1.5% from CMP, target 11260. Buyback at Rs 12000 (record May 29) provides price floor. Q4 standalone PAT +34%, 1500% dividend. Thesis intact, SL absorbs normal chop. Hold to thesis, do not preempt SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "-1.8%, SL 468 = -2.2% from CMP 478.40. Q4 PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance upgraded to low double-digit. FMCG sector leading today. Hold; let SL do its job — no premature exit (Rule 17)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "+3.7% winner. SL already at 1255 (entry+2.4%, 1.3% below CMP 1271.60 — satisfies 1% trail-gap floor). FY26 PAT +148%, Rs 3000 Cr capex. No further tighten needed — risks self-stopout. Keep target 1320."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Just entered at 1248, CMP 1257.50 (+0.5%). Q4 PAT +21.6%, sector outperformer. SL 1198 = -4.7%, target 1330 = +6.6%, R:R 1.4 (slightly below 1.5 but at entry sizing). Hold to thesis; let position develop."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Flat from entry 865. SL 850 = -1.6%, target 920. Capex/T&D cycle intact, order book Rs 17,100 Cr, 3.2x volume on weak sector day signals accumulation. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-0.2%, SL 7950 = -1.6% from CMP 8076.50, target 8500. HSBC upgrade to TP 9000. Q4 results May 20 — 7 sessions away, outside 3-session binary window. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Data anomaly: stored entry 8400 vs CMP 3191 — research confirms MCX real CMP ~3201 (Q4 PAT +291%, ATH on May 7). The -62% / -₹31,252 is a corrupted cost-basis display, not real loss. Real entry likely much closer to CMP; SL 8150 above CMP is also corrupted. Cannot meaningfully MODIFY without true entry data. Flag for manual reconciliation; emitting HOLD to avoid acting on bad data. Earnings call TODAY 4pm — binary event within 3 sessions per Rule 11, but exit on corrupted SL data would be acting on a broker-side display bug, not the actual position."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "-0.1%, SL 1830 = -2.3% from CMP 1872.20, target 1950. Organon deal narrative + Pharma sector at 52w high. Q4 results around May 20 — outside 3-session binary window. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 5,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1670.00,
      "stop_loss": 1610.00,
      "target": 1770.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Healthcare leadership day (+7.2%); diagnostics defensive in risk-off tape. Position size: 5 x 1670 = ₹8,350 (~0.86% capital — small, justified by NEUTRAL research read with -0.03 modifier — Q4 PAT -15% YoY is a real flag). SL 1610 = -3.6%, target 1770 (52w high) = +6%, R:R 1.67 ✓. Small toehold sizing respects mixed fundamentals while capturing momentum breakout. Cluster check: no other diagnostics held."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "OPEN pending order: BUY 20x TATACONSUM LIMIT 1240 from 357m ago. CMP 1257.50 — the LIMIT is below market and won't fill unless price retraces 1.4%. Already filled position exists (40 qty at 1248). Per Rule 9, do not stack another order. Letting the pending 1240 sit is fine (it's a dip-buy); could CANCEL to free intent but no urgency. Choosing to leave it — represents a 'add on dip' that respects sector momentum."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL 121 intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 832 already locks in breakeven+; 1.7% below CMP — within trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "+10.1% winner, SL 1357.30 already 2% below CMP, locking gains. Run to target 1450."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Trail not triggered (P&L <2%)."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 margin concern; SL tight at 8950."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at Rs 12000 record May 29. SL absorbs chop."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 print clean; let SL 468 do its job."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1255 already locking gains, 1.3% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry, let thesis develop."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Order book Rs 17,100 Cr, breakout context intact."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "HSBC upgrade, Q4 May 20 outside binary window."},
    {"symbol": "MCX", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Cost-basis data anomaly — entry 8400 vs CMP 3191 is corrupted; cannot act meaningfully. Flagged for reconciliation."},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Organon deal narrative intact; Q4 May 20."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walked admit candidates per Rule 18: TATACONSUM already held (rejected duplicate). COFORGE already held (rejected duplicate). LALPATHLAB → admitted as small toehold. LAURUSLABS already held. MCX already held + Q4 call TODAY 4pm = binary event (Rule 11, no new entry). SUNPHARMA already held. APOLLOHOSP already held. BAJAJ-AUTO already held. CGPOWER already held. DABUR already held. MARICO already held. POLYCAB already held. SRF already held. COFORGE/PERSISTENT/SUNPHARMA — all defensives already represented; PERSISTENT NEUTRAL +0.02 not strong enough to add IT exposure beyond COFORGE. THERMAX (gapped +9.7%) extended, no entry. BIOCON not deeply researched, skip. DRREDDY/TORNTPOWER results May 12 — Rule 11 binary block. Deployment at 54% with ₹257K remaining; added LALPATHLAB toehold ~0.86% capital. Book is already broadly diversified across 13 names (FMCG x3, Pharma x3, IT x1, Cap goods x2, Auto x1, Chem x1, Healthcare x1, Gold ETF x1, Fin Svc x1). Further admits gated by quality, not quantity.",
  "portfolio_notes": "MCX cost-basis anomaly (-₹31,252 unrealized) is the dominant noise in today's P&L display — flagged for manual reconciliation; real CMP/entry are likely much closer. Excluding MCX, real unrealized is +₹4,371 across 12 positions on a -1% Nifty day — strong defensive positioning. Risk-off tape with VIX +9% justifies the defensive tilt; no need to chase fading sectors. Rule 17 reminder: holding to SLs on small-loss positions (GOLDBEES, POLYCAB, BAJAJ-AUTO, DABUR, APOLLOHOSP, SUNPHARMA) is the calibrated play, not preemptive exit. Daily loss limit ₹73K with ₹49K remaining — plenty of buffer."
}
